Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jennifer Tullius (213-787-5958) for Plaintiff Foxtrot Holdings, LLC.
No other appearances.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Why Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
